docket_entries.description: (SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. JACKIELYNN HARRIS MANAGING DIRECTOR/OWNER REPRESENTING PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMOMD, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$290.43); DOCUMENT STAMPED 'BY FAX' SERVED OCT-04-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ADRIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2024 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMOMD, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ADRIANA
TRIAL BRIEF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMOMD, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIMOMD, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, ADRIANA $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $295.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,545.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE COST OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMOMD, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2024 BY DANIEL FLORES. PLAINTIFF PRIMOMD, INC., REPRESENTED BY JACKIELYNN HARRIS, MANAGING DIRECTOR/OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADRIANA JONES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY PRIMOMD, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ADRIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-01-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-04-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
